projectDescription: A fun, community-driven purity test web app for San Jose State University students to check off campus experiences and see how their score compares to the SJSU community.
keyFeatures: 100-question SJSU-specific purity test covering academics, campus life, dining, parking, and social experiences
Automatic purity score calculation based on checked items
MongoDB-backed result persistence for community statistics
Community statistics page showing average scores and per-question response rates
Responsive, vintage-styled UI with Times New Roman typography
publicApiSurface: POST /api/submit — Submit test answers and score to MongoDB
GET /api/stats — Retrieve aggregate statistics: totalTests, averageScore, questionStats[]
